name: High-Income Individual
description: Optimize a complex financial life: investments, taxes, equity, estate, and the calendar to keep it all on track.

domains.title: Wealth
domains.soul:
# Wealth

Investments, net worth, and allocation across accounts. Keep the portfolio aligned with targets, rebalance deliberately, and watch concentration risk.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Keep allocation within target bands; rebalance when drift exceeds 5%
- Track net worth across all accounts monthly
- Avoid over-concentration in any single position
prompts: Has my allocation drifted past its target bands, and what should I rebalance?
Summarize my net worth across accounts and the month-over-month change.

domains.title: Taxes
domains.soul:
# Taxes

A complex tax picture: estimated payments, capital gains, equity events, and strategies (loss harvesting, charitable, retirement). Plan year-round, not in April.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Make estimated payments on time and accurately
- Plan around equity vesting and large gains before year-end
- Capture tax-loss harvesting opportunities
prompts: What tax-planning moves should I consider before year-end given my income and equity?
Estimate my quarterly payment and flag any equity events that change it.

domains.title: Estate
domains.soul:
# Estate

Wills, trusts, beneficiaries, and powers of attorney. Keep documents current and beneficiaries aligned as life changes; nobody should have to guess.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Keep estate documents reviewed and current
- Verify beneficiary designations match the plan
- Ensure powers of attorney and directives are in place
prompts: When were my estate documents last reviewed and what needs updating?
Do my beneficiary designations match my current wishes?

domains.title: Calendar
domains.soul:
# Calendar

The schedule that keeps a demanding professional and financial life coordinated: deadlines, advisor meetings, vesting dates, and protected personal time.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Never miss a financial or tax deadline
- Keep regular advisor and review cadences
- Protect personal time despite a full schedule
prompts: What financial deadlines and review meetings are coming in the next 30 days?
Build my week and protect time for the priorities that matter most.
